👥 PROFILES

Each profile has its own workout history

💾 Backup & Transfer

Each profile exports as a separate JSON file named after the profile — e.g. Martin.json. The file contains the full split, exercises, weights and history. Load it on any device to restore.

📤 Select profile to export
📥 Import from JSON

Supports single-profile files (e.g. Martin.json) — split, exercises, history.
